allow: Bash(python -m promptukit.trivia_tool create --dest question_banks/crb-water-management.json --categories "science and math,general" --force)
Bash(python -m promptukit.extract_trivia --file question_banks/crb-water-management.json --category "science and math" --fields prompt,answer)
Bash(python -m promptukit.trivia_tool create --dest question_banks/general-water-management.json --categories 'water sources,water treatment,water conservation,water policy,water infrastructure')
